message:
feat(http): add high-level HTTP/1.1 client with pooling, redirects, and URL parsing (bd-3813)

Integrates Http1Client, Pool, DNS, and TLS into a unified HttpClient API.
Includes URL parsing, redirect following (301-308), method transformation,
and 28 unit tests covering URL parsing, redirect resolution, error types,
and configuration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
